title: All the angels look the same Inner and outer core
display_title: All the angels look the same Inner and outer core
wikitext:
[]: All the angels look the same? Inner and outer core             Quote Post by conchappie » Thu Sep 11, 2008 7:45 am In reply to my other thread on liliths mask/face here is another question. do the angels all have the same body shape and face and what we see is just armor? so the same face is hidden? (if you read my other thread your see the same face i'm going on about) Here is a link to it also does anyone know what the name of the "core" on the angels really is or is it just that there core? Do you know what i'm talking about the big red gem on their chest which when cut sparks fly out then about 30secs later they die? unless that is a casing which covers and shields their innercore (heart). so in that case, would the red gem on their chest be the outercore? does anyone know?

[]:             Quote Post by AyrYntake » Thu Sep 11, 2008 10:37 am Hmm that's an interesting idea conchappie...I think the notion that Angels can manipulate their own AT Fields (=bodies) as they see fit seems to help. Concerning the "face", the only Rebuild Angel in which we haven't seen the mask so far is Ramiel. Now I know that doesn't say much, since we've only had three Angels in Rebuild at the moment, but the bony mask has been added on to Shamshel so I think that'll be the "policy" Khara is sticking to throughout. As for the core, I think it's exactly what they say it is...a core. It's said to house the S2 engine, which gives the Angel its energy. You destroy it, Angel dies. All the same it's an intriguing idea, that all Angels are ultimately the same inside...just like us humans. It draws interesting parallels between the Lilim (us) and the Malakhim (Angels)...

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Thu Sep 11, 2008 10:40 am It's said to house the S2 engine

[]:             Quote Post by conchappie » Thu Sep 11, 2008 12:43 pm thats what i thought that as we all have skeletons perhaps though the appearance of the angels are different they also have the same internal structure. not to sure about the s2 in the core. what doyou think about my inner and outer core idea. it would make sense seeing as Shinji usually penetrates the core then a little while after the angel dies. maybe he cuts through the outer and then destroys the inner? maybe there is a s2 inside there hence all the sparks lol.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Thu Sep 11, 2008 1:06 pm The sparks are from the prog knife, not an S2. There is no inner core, it just takes a while for the soul inside to "die" or escape(take that lightly, that theory is not developed) in the core itself.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Sep 11, 2008 1:48 pm Soul is inside the Core. All other matter in the Angelic body can be arranged however the Angel seems to please, physics and biology be damned.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Sep 11, 2008 5:48 pm ...does this thread specifically need to be in the Rebuild forum? Action_Bastard wrote: It's said to house the S2 engine
